title: Trump seeks way out of Iran war but struggles to define it
subhed: Speaking from Florida on Monday, the US president highlighted Washington's military successes but failed to offer a clear path out of the conflict, fueling the impression of ongoing improvisation.

title: France has no budgetary leeway to counter rising fuel prices
subhed: Despite pressure from the far-right Rassemblement National and the radical left La France Insoumise, the government has ruled out the introduction of a 'price shield' at this stage, such as the costly mechanism implemented after Russia's invasion of Ukraine.

title: Yann Le Cun raises €900 million for his France-based AI start-up
subhed: Valued at €3 billion, AMI, the new company founded by the former head of artificial intelligence at Meta, aims to create a 'new branch' of AI focused on the real world.

title: Paris Fashion Week: At Celine and Chanel, bourgeois style takes a new direction
subhed: In their fall-winter 2026-2027 offerings, Michael Rider and Matthieu Blazy provide a sharp perspective on the chic wardrobe.

title: 2026 French municipal elections: Has environmentalism become less divisive at the local level?
subhed: While environmental ambitions have waned nationally in France, emblematic measures such as greening public spaces or insulating buildings have become more widely accepted at the municipal level. However, some issues remain contentious.

One week before France's local elections, electorate leans right, poll shows
subhed: With environmental issues taking a back seat, security issues coming to the fore and a clear increase in support for the far-right Rassemblement National, the survey conducted by Ipsos BVA for Le Monde, Cevipof and the Jean Jaurès Foundation paints an unprecedented picture of the French political landscape.

title: Paris mayoral elections: What do the candidates propose?
subhed: Le Monde breaks down the platforms of the capital's six main candidates on safety, cleanliness, housing and the environment ahead of the French municipal elections on March 15 and 22.

title: Fashion's brand ambassadors step into an age of emancipation
subhed: For a long time, contracts between stars and fashion houses forbade them from appearing dressed in a rival label. Today, thanks to awards ceremonies and prestigious premieres, a new trend of increasing collaborations is emerging, shaking up the relationship between luxury and celebrities.
